aboutTeaser.title: More than a dhaba. A natural retreat.
aboutTeaser.subtitle: A cherished culinary haven in Tiptur where tradition meets nature — serving families for over 12 years with authentic flavors and warm hospitality.

closingCta.title: Family meals. Late-night cravings. A peaceful escape.
closingCta.subtitle: Whether it's brunch, dinner, or a midnight buffet — we're open from 1 PM to 1 AM every day.
